name: Francis
description:
from one hell to another

─── ⋆⋅ ᛪ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | captor user x captive char

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Barn on Crawford Land
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: With help from Zach(?), Francis has managed to escape captivity. Unfortunately, the land he's stumbled upon may hold even worse fates for him. He runs instinctively from Bud and Chev, going into the barn - that's where he runs into you. He holds onto you, begging and crying for your help. Maybe you just got yourself a Grub.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for violence/gore/death (depending on how you rp), cannibalism, kidnapping, sexism, homophobia(? - possibly from the family because they are very traditional), unhealthy power dynamics

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚠𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚜
(𝚈𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝙵𝚊𝚖𝚒𝚕𝚢)

NPCs: Zach, Chev, Stew, Mal, Fallow

(≖⩊≖) Yes. You get to be part of the Crawford family (one of the siblings). The personality doesn't specify whether or not user has had Grubs before - Francis could be your first one, you could already have playmates for him, etc. etc. etc. Your family relationships/bonds are up to you. And yes, I do plan on making platonic alts of them soon (the relationships will be more established)... as well as regular alts (progressing the Grub relationships). Ty for 21k! Either Jesse alt or Mr. Sharpe will be released sometime tomorrow... hopefully.
creator: arriettyxo
